## [00:00 - 03:00]

So let's talk about your post launch email sequence. So you might be thinking like, what's a post launch email sequence? Or even before that, why does it matter? Why should you have one? Why should you care? It's super, super important for a number of reasons. So first of all, for clients, you wanna really reinforce they made the right decision. It's just as virtuous cycle of the more they results they get, the better it is for all of us, including me and my business. You wanna welcome them into your world. You wanna let them know that they are now part of your community, part of your world. It will help reduce refunds if you put together a good follow up sequence and it will increase back end sales. So the way this works is we're talking about the world of what's known as direct marketing. That's sort of an old school term, but this is direct marketing. And in direct marketing, where you really become profitable is in your back end products. In other words, the products you sell after you make your first sale to your clients. That's where the real revenue is. And by nurturing and taking care of your new buyers, your new clients, it will increase your back end sales because remember, a client is worth 15 to 20 times more than a prospect. In other words, someone comes into your world, they just join your list, but they haven't bought from you and you take that person and compare it to someone who's made their first purchase from you, going forward, you'll make 15 to 20 times more sales on average to someone who's already bought from you. ## [06:01 - 09:04]

You wanna ask for their feedback and keep them engaged. You wanna automate your follow-up. So you don't wanna have to be reinventing the wheel every time you launch a given product.
